properties.text: All allocations in cache_destroy() in cache.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in cache_destroy: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in lru_crawler_close_client() in crawler.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in lru_crawler_close_client: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in do_add_delta() in memcached.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in do_add_delta: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in add_delta() in proto_bin.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in add_delta: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in add_delta() in proto_text.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in add_delta: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in add_delta() in proxy_internal.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in add_delta: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in SSL_is_init_finished() in proxy_tls.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in SSL_is_init_finished: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in cache_free() in cache.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in cache_free: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in lru_crawler_release_client() in crawler.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in lru_crawler_release_client: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in flag_enabled_disabled() in memcached.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in flag_enabled_disabled: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: strdup() allocated pointer 'list' in server_sockets() must be freed on all early-return paths
properties.assertion: forall alloc(list) via strdup in server_sockets: free(list) on every return path

properties.text: subopts_orig allocated via strdup() in main() must be freed before function returns
properties.assertion: forall alloc(subopts_orig) via strdup in main: free(subopts_orig) before return

properties.text: temp_portnumber_filename allocated via malloc() in main() must be freed when portnumber_file is NULL
properties.assertion: forall alloc(temp_portnumber_filename) via malloc in main: free(temp_portnumber_filename) on every return path

properties.text: calloc allocation st.page_data in _evict_page() must be freed on all return paths
properties.assertion: forall alloc(page_data) via calloc in _evict_page: free(page_data) before return

properties.text: All allocations (flist, db, db->buf, db->fname) in proxy_init_startfiles() must be freed on error paths
properties.assertion: forall alloc in proxy_init_startfiles: freed on every error return path

properties.text: getline()-allocated 'line' in restart_get_kv() must be freed in RESTART_NOTAG and EOF error branches
properties.assertion: forall alloc(line) via getline in restart_get_kv: free(line) on RESTART_NOTAG and EOF paths

properties.text: iter from calloc() in assoc_get_iterator() must be freed when mutex_trylock fails before returning NULL
properties.assertion: forall alloc(iter) via calloc in assoc_get_iterator: free(iter) when mutex_trylock fails
